description: False positive tracking for security scans. Findings listed here have been manually reviewed and dismissed.

B608.reason: All SQL queries use parameterized ? placeholders or f-string table names with regex validation

B310.reason: Intentional URL opens in CLI single_agent mode — not user-controlled input

B108.reason: Temp file/directory usage in sandbox verifier and test code — acceptable risk

B104.reason: Bind to 0.0.0.0 in API server startup — intended for container networking

B314.reason: defusedxml.defuse_stdlib() called at module load in scanner_parsers.py — all XML parsing is safe

B103.reason: Permissive chmod in data directory setup — acceptable for local dev

B113.reason: No timeout on request — acceptable in CLI tool with user-controlled URLs

SAST-024.reason: Admin endpoints have auth enforced at router mount level via Depends(_verify_api_key, _require_scope) in app.py. Includes mpte_router configs.

SAST-007.reason: Pattern strings in SAST/autofix rule detection lists, not actual deserialization calls

SAST-077.reason: Pattern strings in SAST rule detection lists, not actual eval usage

SAST-089.reason: Code BLOCKS cloud metadata endpoints. DAST engine references are for testing.

SAST-028.reason: Configurable verify_ssl for pen-testing tools. Self-signed cert support required for MPTE.

SAST-065.reason: Pattern string 'yaml.load(' in SAST rule detection list

SAST-081.reason: Pattern string 'pickle.loads(' in SAST rule detection list

SAST-001.reason: PersistentDict table name validation added (regex, persistent_store.py:30-39). All queries parameterized.

SAST-091.reason: Scanner engines intentionally test various URL schemes — this is their purpose

SAST-006.reason: Enum values (API_KEY='api_key', PASSWORD='password') — not actual credentials

SAST-027.reason: SAST rule detection patterns for ECB mode, not actual ECB usage

SAST-039.reason: app.py:2127 builds display string for SARIF data — not an HTTP response header

SAST-073.reason: Connector auth headers. TLS determined by runtime base_url config.

SAST-047.reason: GraphQL queries are hardcoded string literals with parameterized variables. No user input interpolation.

SAST-088.reason: PII log findings in sast_engine.py are rule pattern strings. cli.py:1408 is debug context.

SAST-090.reason: sast_engine.py:1000 is SAST rule pattern for detecting SSRF, not an actual request.

SAST-030.reason: sast_engine.py:376 is SAST rule pattern detecting weak TLS.

graph_py_format_token.reason: Git log format string, not a secret token

scanner_dashboard_example.reason: Example code shown in UI demo for scanner demonstration
